items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: Crypto lobby backs formal removal of ‘reputation risk’ from bank examinations
items.summary: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. finalized a similar rule removing reputation risk earlier this month.

items.title: Bitcoin shorts create $1.4B liquidation risk: Is price squeeze to $80K next?
items.summary: Bitcoin failed to overcome $79,000, but a potential bear trap formed as $1.4 billion in short positions face liquidation at $80,000. Will spot market demand be the trigger?

items.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $76,600 as rising oil price and Iran risks stall the rally
items.summary: Short-term holder profit-taking is offsetting fresh demand from ETFs and Strategy, pointing to consolidation below $80,000, Bitfinex analysts said.

items.title: Fidelity Digital Assets says bitcoin is leading crypto market stabilization
items.summary: Despite muted prices to start the second quarter, the report said improving onchain metrics and network activity point to a market finding its footing.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins rally coincides with token unlock as analyst flags exit liquidity risk
items.summary: DNTV Research's Bradley Park says bullish ecosystem news gave large holders the liquidity they needed to sell into a recent PENGU unlock.

items.title: Tennessee crypto kiosk ban set to go into effect July 1
items.summary: Crypto ATM operators and businesses hosting the machines have until July 1 to be in compliance with the new law or risk potential fines and prison time.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Ondo Finance adds proxy voting for holders of its $700 million tokenized equities
items.summary: The move aims to bring Ondo's tokenized stocks and ETFs closer to traditional ones held in a brokerage account.

items.title: Three Bank of Japan members call for a rate hike; yen rises while bitcoin falls
items.summary: Markets are pricing in a June rate hike after a split BoJ vote that saw three policymakers dissent in favor of a hike.

items.title: What next as XRP drops 3% under $1.40 on strong selling
items.summary: High-volume breakdown confirms sellers in control, with failed support turning into a key pivot as downside targets come into focus.

items.title: Bitcoin loses $77,000, ether, solana slide as Hormuz standoff lifts oil to 3-week high
items.summary: Bitcoin traded at $76,923 on Tuesday morning, down 2.4% over 24 hours after rejecting $79,400 the previous day, with the entire top 10 closing red as Brent crude extended its rally to a seventh straight day.

items.title: Bitcoin pressured by Fed uncertainty, oil, and AI slowdown
items.summary: Enflux points to oil-driven inflation as the main constraint, while questions around AI demand could reshape miner selling in the months ahead.

items.title: Trump changes tune on prediction markets days after saying he disliked them
items.summary: Donald Trump says the US can’t be “left out in the cold” on prediction markets just days after he said he was “not happy” with the fast-growing platforms.

items.title: Three Bitcoin charts say BTC price may rally toward $82K
items.summary: Bitcoin’s ascending channel setup and rising stablecoin inflows suggest improving liquidity conditions could support a push toward higher price levels.

items.title: Acting AG Todd Blanche confirms ‘code is not a crime’ in DOJ pivot
items.summary: Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche said developers will no longer be investigated or charged unless they knowingly help third parties commit crimes.

items.title: Dorsey's Block unveils Bitcoin proof-of-reserves in transparency move
items.summary: Block’s proof-of-reserves will enable anyone to verify the company’s 8,883 Bitcoin stash worth over $680 million through an on-chain signature.

items.title: Solana clients Anza and Firedancer introduce post-quantum solution Falcon
items.summary: Jump Crypto, the team behind Firedancer, said Falcon has the smallest signature among NIST standards, which could help preserve Solana’s high-throughput capabilities.

items.title: Scammers use Gmail dot alias trick to spoof Robinhood in phishing scam
items.summary: Visiting the fake login website alone isn’t enough for hackers to gain entry to accounts. However, entering sensitive information such as passwords could grant them access.

items.title: Tillis won’t support Senate crypto bill without ethics provision
items.summary: Democrats seeking to crack down on the Trump family’s crypto empire have found an ally in Republican Thom Tillis, who supports ethics provisions in a key crypto bill.
